ns0:entry.ns0:title: Anil-matcha/Open-Generative-AI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Anil-matcha/Open-Generative-AI
Language: javascript
Uncensored, open-source alternative to Higgsfield AI, Freepik, Krea, Openart AI — Free, unrestricted AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TryGhost/Ghost
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TryGhost/Ghost
Language: javascript
Independent technology for modern publishing, memberships, subscriptions and newsletters.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: a5c-ai/babysitter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/a5c-ai/babysitter
Language: javascript
Babysitter enforces obedience on agentic workforces and enables them to manage extremely complex tasks and workflows through deterministic, hallucination-free self-orchestration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coreyhaines31/marketingskills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coreyhaines31/marketingskills
Language: javascript
Marketing skills for Claude Code and AI agents. CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: datawhalechina/easy-vibe
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/datawhalechina/easy-vibe
Language: javascript
💻 vibe coding 2026 | Your first modern programming course for beginners to master step by step.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: decolua/9router
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/decolua/9router
Language: javascript
Connect All AI Code Tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Antigravity, Copilot, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode, Cline, OpenClaw...) to 40+ AI Providers & 100+ Models

ns0:entry.ns0:title: eyaltoledano/claude-task-master
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/eyaltoledano/claude-task-master
Language: javascript
An AI-powered task-management system you can drop into Cursor, Lovable, Windsurf, Roo, and others.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: justlovemaki/AIClient-2-API
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/justlovemaki/AIClient-2-API
Language: javascript
Simulates Gemini CLI, Antigravity, Codex, Grok, and Kiro client requests, compatible with the OpenAI API. It supports thousands of Gemini model requests per day and offers free use of the built-in Claude model in Kiro. Easily connect to any client via the API, making AI development more efficient!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ryanhanwu/How-To-Ask-Questions-The-Smart-Way
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ryanhanwu/How-To-Ask-Questions-The-Smart-Way
Language: javascript
本文原文由知名 Hacker Eric S. Raymond 所撰寫，教你如何正確的提出技術問題並獲得你滿意的答案。
